title: Organisation founded
details: Medicart eSports was founded by Grev.

details: Medisports joined The CTea Party, founded by Grev and DontKnow of Dont Know Gaming.

title: Signed Hunglow
details: Hunglow was signed from free agency.

title: Qualified for Cyber X Open
details: Medisports qualified for the Cyber X Open.

details: Medisports were eliminated in the Round of 16.

title: Qualified for Cyber X Open
details: Medisports qualified for the Cyber X Open again.

title: Signed 8eeR
details: 8eeR was signed from neXus Academy.

title: Signed Melted
details: Melted was signed from Rainbow Road.

title: Cyber X Series Season 6 Round of 16 exit
details: Medisports were eliminated in the Round of 16.

title: Rebranded to Medicart
details: Medicart eSports rebranded to Medicart.

title: Qualified for Cyber X Open
details: Medisports qualified for the Cyber X Open.

title: Left The CTea Party
details: Medisports left The CTea Party after internal conflict and community closure.

title: Joined Lowlands9
details: Medisports joined Lowlands9 after discussions with the community leadership.

title: Signed stroky
details: stroky was signed from BCB eSports.

title: Signed GreekFreakKief
details: GreekFreakKief was signed from ᴄʜᴀᴏѕ ɪѕ ᴀ ʟᴀᴅᴅᴇʀ.

title: Cyber X Open Round of 16 exit
details: Medisports were eliminated in the Round of 16 by Hovsta Gubbs.

title: Sold badreN
details: badreN was sold to Chinelo Vuitton.
notes: Exact date and fee unknown; Player: badreN

title: Promoted to B Tier
details: Medisports became a B Tier team.

title: Qualified for Epsylum Open
details: Medisports qualified for the Epsylum Open.

title: Epsylum Open Round of 16 exit
details: Medisports were eliminated in the Round of 16.

title: Pondfillers Contenders Season 8 group-stage exit
details: Medisports qualified for Pondfillers Contenders Season 8, made it past preliminaries, and went out in the group stage.

title: Sold ricardochet
details: ricardochet was sold to The Night's Watch.

title: Promoted to A Tier
details: Medisports were promoted to A Tier.

title: Signed jazooka and onebody
details: jazooka and onebody were signed.

title: Qualified for Epsylum Open
details: Medisports qualified for the Epsylum Open again.

title: Epsylum Open quarter-final finish
details: Medisports reached the quarter-finals.

title: Zynora Championship Stage 1 finish
details: Medisports entered Zynora Championship Stage 1 and finished 22nd.

title: Zynora Championship Stage 2 finish
details: Medisports moved into Zynora Championship Stage 2 and finished 82nd, missing the Major and dropping into the Minor route.
notes: Missed Major qualification; entered Zynora Contenders Season 9

title: Signed bonk
details: bonk was signed from ⲓⲛⲛⲉꞅⲥⲓⲁ.

title: Left Lowlands9
details: Medisports left Lowlands9 after taking on too much responsibility.

title: Joined ᴍᴀᴅᴍᴇɴ
details: Cyrus of Ginko approached Grev after Medisports left Lowlands9. After several days of talks, Medisports joined ᴍᴀᴅᴍᴇɴ directly into the main community, skipping academy.

title: Signed SantiSupreme
details: SantiSupreme was signed from free agency.

title: Signed HazardiaN
details: HazardiaN was signed from C64.

title: Zynora Contenders Season 9 Round of 16 finish
details: Medisports reached the Round of 16, the furthest the organisation had gone in Minor/Major competition to that point.

title: Direct invite to Nova Prime Championship Stage 2
details: Medisports received a direct invite to Nova Prime Championship Stage 2.

title: Qualified for Nova Prime Challengers Season 10
details: Medisports placed 7th in preliminaries to qualify for Nova Prime Challengers Season 10.
competition: Nova Prime Championship Stage 2 / Nova Prime Challengers Season 10

title: Nova Prime Challengers Season 10 group-stage exit
details: Medisports finished bottom of the groups in Nova Prime Challengers Season 10.

title: Sold Hunglow
details: Hunglow was sold to Rule them all.

title: Qualified for Cyberathletes Open
details: Medisports qualified for the Cyberathletes Open.

title: Cyberathletes Open preliminary exit
details: Medisports failed to make it past preliminaries, finishing 3–4 and placing 32nd.

title: Expected to remain A Tier
details: Medisports were expected to remain an A Tier team based on overall performance.

title: Season 11 began
details: Season 11 began.

title: Direct invite to Cryonix Championship Stage 2
details: Medisports received a direct invite to Cryonix Championship Stage 2, skipping Stage 1.

details: bonk moved into the main lineup as IGL.

title: stroky moved into main lineup
details: stroky moved into the main lineup.

title: 8eeR benched
details: 8eeR was moved to the bench.

title: GreekFreakKief benched
details: GreekFreakKief was moved to the bench.

details: Medisports rose in the world rankings from 97th to 93rd.
